item.title: Oriental Hotels Q4 FY26: Strong Profit Surge Masks Valuation Concerns Amid Technical Weakness
item.description: Oriental Hotels Ltd., the hospitality company operating premium hotels under the Taj brand, reported a remarkable 66.98% year-on-year surge in consolidated net profit to ₹32.41 crores for Q4 FY26, marking its strongest quarterly performance in recent history. However, the stock has struggled significantly, declining 33.40% over the past year and currently trading at ₹98.03 with a market capitalisation of ₹1,799 crores. Despite the impressive quarterly numbers, investors remain cautious as the company grapples with technical headwinds, elevated valuation multiples, and weak return ratios that continue to raise questions about sustainable value creation. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Suryo Foods Q4 FY26: Losses Deepen as Operations Remain Dormant
item.description: Suryo Foods and Industries Ltd. reported a net loss of ₹0.36 crores for Q4 FY26, marking a sharp deterioration from the ₹0.21 crores profit recorded in Q4 FY25. The micro-cap FMCG company, with a market capitalisation of ₹14.00 crores, continues to grapple with zero revenue operations whilst accumulating losses quarter after quarter. The stock, however, surged 9.86% to ₹21.94 on May 04, 2026, despite the concerning financial trajectory. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Exide Industries Q4 FY26: Profit Growth Masks Margin Pressures Amid Premium Valuation
item.description: Exide Industries Ltd., India's largest automotive battery manufacturer with a market capitalisation of ₹31,059 crores, reported a consolidated net profit of ₹215.25 crores for Q4 FY26, marking a 15.19% year-on-year increase but reflecting sequential growth moderation at 10.95%. The stock traded at ₹359.45 on May 04, 2026, down 0.32% from the previous close, as investors digested results that showcased revenue strength but persistent margin challenges. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are IKIO Technologies Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: IKIO Technologies Ltd's latest Q4 FY26 results show a strong recovery with a net profit of ₹16.49 crores and record revenue of ₹165.35 crores, but concerns remain due to low return ratios and stretched valuation multiples, suggesting investors should proceed with caution. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Shera Energy Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Shera Energy Ltd's latest Q3 FY26 results show strong year-on-year profit growth of 110.31% to ₹7.55 crores and a 29.69% increase in net sales, but high debt levels and rising interest expenses pose significant financial risks. Overall, while revenue growth is positive, concerns about capital efficiency and debt servicing remain. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Monolithisch India Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Monolithisch India Ltd's latest Q4 FY26 results are strong, with a 55.21% increase in net sales and a 105.84% rise in net profit year-on-year. However, its high price-to-earnings ratio of 53x raises concerns about valuation sustainability despite impressive operational performance. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Kothari Sugars Q4 FY26: Profit Turnaround Masks Deeper Revenue Crisis
item.description: Kothari Sugars & Chemicals Ltd., a Chennai-based sugar and chemicals manufacturer with a market capitalisation of ₹234.00 crores, reported a technical profit turnaround in Q4 FY26, posting net profit of ₹0.63 crores compared to a loss of ₹0.69 crores in Q4 FY25. However, this modest recovery was overshadowed by a dramatic 40.13% sequential revenue collapse, with net sales plunging to ₹41.96 crores from ₹70.09 crores in the previous quarter, signalling severe operational distress in the company's core sugar operations. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Key Corp Q4 FY26: Massive Loss Erodes Annual Gains as NBFC Faces Operational Crisis
item.description: Key Corp Ltd., one of northern India's oldest non-banking financial companies, reported a devastating quarterly loss of ₹9.62 crores in Q4 FY26 (Mar'26), marking a dramatic reversal from the ₹1.59 crore profit recorded in Q3 FY26. The Kanpur-based NBFC's stock tumbled 4.99% to ₹76.86 following the results announcement, reflecting investor alarm over the company's deteriorating operational performance and raising serious questions about management execution. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Southern Magnesium Q4 FY26: Profits Return Amid Revenue Volatility, But Valuation Concerns Persist
item.description: Southern Magnesium & Chemicals Ltd., a micro-cap minerals and mining company specialising in magnesium products, reported a return to profitability in Q4 FY26 with a net profit of ₹0.06 crores, marking a recovery from the ₹0.04 crore loss recorded in the previous quarter. However, the company's highly volatile revenue trajectory and extreme valuation multiples continue to raise serious concerns for investors. The stock closed at ₹92.01 on May 4, 2026, up 5.76% on the day but down 36.54% over the past year, significantly underperforming both the broader market and its sector peers. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Nalin Lease Finance Q4 FY26: Profit Plunges 51% QoQ Amid Revenue Collapse
item.description: Nalin Lease Finance Ltd., a micro-cap non-banking financial company, reported a sharp sequential decline in its fourth quarter FY26 results, with net profit dropping 51.38% quarter-on-quarter to ₹0.74 crores from ₹0.75 crores in Q3 FY26. The deterioration was driven by a dramatic 51.38% QoQ collapse in net sales to ₹0.88 crores, marking the lowest quarterly revenue in at least seven quarters. The stock, currently trading at ₹45.96 with a market capitalisation of ₹32.00 crores, has declined 2.57% following the results announcement, extending its one-year loss to 28.52%. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Ather Energy Q4 FY26: Narrowing Losses But Profitability Remains Elusive
item.description: Ather Energy Limited, the Bengaluru-based electric two-wheeler manufacturer, reported a quarterly net loss of ₹100.23 crores for Q4 FY26, marking a marginal improvement from the previous quarter's loss of ₹84.64 crores. Despite the sequential deterioration in absolute losses, the company demonstrated strong operational momentum with net sales surging 73.75% year-on-year to ₹1,174.66 crores, whilst operating margins improved substantially to negative 5.92% from negative 25.48% a year ago. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: CDSL Q4 FY26: Profit Plunges 20% as Revenue Volatility Raises Concerns
item.description: Central Depository Services (India) Ltd., the country's second-largest depository with a market capitalisation of ₹25,958 crores, reported a disappointing fourth quarter for FY26, with consolidated net profit declining 20.03% year-on-year to ₹80.22 crores. The quarter-on-quarter decline was even more pronounced at 39.83%, marking a significant setback for the company that has been grappling with revenue volatility throughout the fiscal year. The stock has reacted negatively to the results, trading at ₹1,238.30, down 2.65% and reflecting investor concerns about the sustainability of the company's growth trajectory. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: BHEL Q4 FY26: Record Quarter Masks Deeper Profitability Concerns
item.description: Bharat Heavy Electricals Ltd. (BHEL) reported a spectacular fourth quarter for FY26, with consolidated net profit surging 230.55% quarter-on-quarter to ₹1,290.47 crores and 155.82% year-on-year. The state-owned power equipment manufacturer's shares rallied 6.97% following the results announcement, touching an intraday high of ₹398.95—just shy of its 52-week peak—as investors celebrated the headline numbers from India's second-largest heavy electrical equipment company. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Godrej Properties Q4 FY26: Strong Revenue Surge Masks Underlying Profitability Concerns
item.description: Godrej Properties Ltd., one of India's leading real estate developers with a market capitalisation of ₹56,699 crores, reported a dramatic 70.13% year-on-year surge in consolidated net profit to ₹649.88 crores for Q4 FY26, driven primarily by exceptional revenue recognition from project completions. However, the headline numbers conceal troubling structural issues, as the company's operating profitability remains heavily dependent on non-operating income whilst core margins continue to disappoint. The stock rallied 3.54% following the results announcement, trading at ₹1,899.80, though it remains 24.16% below its 52-week high of ₹2,505.00. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Golden Cross Confirmed: Do NTPC Green Energy Ltd's Other Technical Indicators Agree?
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for NTPC Green Energy Ltd, signalling a golden cross on 4 May 2026. Yet, the broader technical picture presents a nuanced view, with some indicators supporting the crossover while others remain inconclusive or bearish — does this mixed technical backdrop undermine the reliability of the signal? Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Golden Cross Forms in ACME Solar Holdings Ltd — On a Day the Stock Fell 1.47%. What the Mixed Signals Mean
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for ACME Solar Holdings Ltd, signalling a golden cross on 4 May 2026. Yet, the stock declined 1.47% on the same day, and monthly technical indicators remain inconclusive. This juxtaposition of signals calls for a detailed examination of the broader technical and fundamental context. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Golden Cross Forms in GHCL Textiles Ltd Amid Mixed Technical Signals
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for GHCL Textiles Ltd, signalling a golden cross on 4 May 2026. Yet, the broader technical picture is conflicted, with monthly momentum indicators showing mild bearishness despite weekly signals trending positive. This divergence raises questions about the strength of the crossover as a reliable bullish indicator. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Rollatainers Ltd Forms Golden Cross Amid Mixed Technical Signals and Strong Recent Rally
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for Rollatainers Ltd, signalling a golden cross on 4 May 2026. Yet, the broader technical and fundamental context presents a nuanced picture, with some indicators supporting the crossover while others suggest caution. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Golden Cross Confirmed: Do Balrampur Chini Mills Ltd's Other Technical Indicators Agree?
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for Balrampur Chini Mills Ltd, signalling a golden cross on 4 May 2026. Yet, the broader technical picture is mixed, with monthly momentum indicators showing mild bearishness despite weekly signals trending positive — does this divergence undermine the reliability of the crossover? Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: {{list.post_title}}
item.description: {{list.post_excerpt}} Time: {{list.post_date_sep}}
